title: The World in Colors
overview: As the descendant of the hero, Kunon Gurion was born blind, and he’s determined to make eyes using his magic.

title: To the School for Noble Children
overview: When Kunon goes to the school for noble children to take exams, he encounters a challenge.

title: Graduation, and What’s Next?
overview: Kunon graduates and Miss Jenie resigns. Kunon wants a Royal Sorcerer for his new teacher.

title: Off to the Castle
overview: Kunon goes to the castle to meet the Royal Sorcerers to be tested and meets Raysha, Mirika’s older sister.

title: Quite A Boy and A New Master
overview: After passing the test at the Black Tower, Kunon finally meets his new master.

title: Incredible Training and Incredible Results
overview: Studying under Zeonly, Kunon finally learns the skills he needs to make eyeballs.

title: Kunon the Sorcerer Can See
overview: Kunon gains vision, but is he seeing more than he should? Then, he departs to the magic school.

title: Farewells and Hellos and Dirashik
overview: Kunon and Rinko, who took over as Kunon’s maid in place of Iko, finally arrive at Dirashik.

title: The Advanced Class
overview: Kunon takes the entrance exam with Professor Soff. At the interview, he meets a mysterious sorcerer.

title: The Saint's Financial Problem
overview: Kunon and Reyes work together to find a solution for Reyes’ financial problem.

title: Flying and Roasting and Being Invited
overview: Kunon asks Hank to cook bacon and Riyah to fly. The three girls try to talk to Kunon but always miss him.

title: Fairies Checking the Answer
overview: Kunon gets recruited by all three factions. And his response…?

title: The Unprecedented Troublemaker
overview: After Kunon passes the test and joins the three factions, he sets sail on the search for a shipwreck.
